Page has 5 sections across 4 distinct templates with no role appearing >2 times — modular layout. Default to Bricks Nestable sections for perf; ACF Flexible Content surfaced as alternative.
open_questions: Confirm with McNeel: use Bricks native Nestable for this page, or fall back to ACF Flexible Content?

layer_2_wp_objects.rationale: Partner picked "external" — events are managed in a third-party system (Church Center / CCB / etc.). Site links out or embeds; no CPT needed.

single_template.rationale: Legacy "wordpress" value — treated as the equivalent of archive_pages (CPT + single template + archive).

archive.rationale: Legacy "wordpress" value — treated as the equivalent of archive_pages (CPT + single template + archive).
